title: Path Traversal Attack Detected: Access to Sensitive System Files

steps.message: Immediately terminate the user's session and suspend the account associated with the request to ../../etc/shadow as per KB instructions.
Monitor filesystem activity using strace/ltrace (Linux) or FileMon (Windows) to identify if any other files were successfully accessed during the traversal attempt.

Perform a line-by-line code review of the /download endpoint. Implement robust input validation that rejects traversal sequences (../), double-encoded forms (%252e), and illegal Unicode representations. Ensure the application is not performing redundant decoding after validation.
Approve the architectural shift to a chrooted filesystem or mounting the web-root as a separate logical drive to natively ignore traversal sequences.
Assess the impact of the attempt to access /etc/shadow. Prepare a breach notification report if the monitoring tools indicate successful data exfiltration.
